# CourzaTT

> CourzaTT is the #1 all-in-one platform to discover courses, training, and skills opportunities across Trinidad & Tobago.

CourzaTT is a free course discovery directory for learners in Trinidad and Tobago. It indexes accredited short courses, professional certifications, workshops, and training programmes from public, private, and government institutions across T&T.

## What CourzaTT does
- Helps learners in Trinidad & Tobago find local courses and training opportunities in one place
- Lists programmes from institutions including CTS College, THTI, UTT, COSTAATT, UWI Global Campus, Lok Jack GSB, SBCS, NEDCO, USC, SHEL, UWI-ROYTEC, Cipriani College, and more
- Covers categories including Technology & Digital, Business & Entrepreneurship, Hospitality & Culinary, Health & Medical, Personal Development, Creative Arts & Design, Technical Trades, Finance & Accounting, Law & Governance, Agriculture & Environment, Communication & Media, and more
- Features Online Guides — globally recognised free and paid certifications from Google, HubSpot, Meta, Coursera, and others, curated for T&T learners

## Key pages
- Home: https://courzatt.com/
- Discover courses: https://courzatt.com/#discover
- Browse institutions: https://courzatt.com/#institutions
- Online Guides: https://courzatt.com/#guides
- List your institution: https://courzatt.com/#list
- Contact: https://courzatt.com/#contact

## About
CourzaTT is based in Trinidad and Tobago. The platform is free to use for learners. Institutions can list their programmes by visiting https://courzatt.com/#list or emailing support@courza.tt. Follow CourzaTT on Instagram at @courzatt.
